title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: GRANTS PASS HIGH SCHOOL SBHC SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams, including sports physicals; treatment of illness and injury; vision, and blood pressure screenings; immunizations; mental health services; age-appropriate reproductive health; routine lab tests; prescription medication maintenance; and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. 830 NE 9th Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Students and staff of schools in the Three Rivers School District Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm, during school session (541) 479-4825 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 479-4825 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurances. Sliding scale fees available. Students will not be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Three Rivers School District SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Services: Childhood Immunization Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON CONTRACEPTIVE CARE (CCARE) SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL CARE SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GRANTS PASS HIGH SCHOOL SBHC
